name: guariglia-baseball-scorecard-builder-v24
description: Guariglia Baseball Scorecard Builder Version 24 with sharpened 300-DPI PDFs, fully clean computer-scored boxes, MLB home-team palettes, optional traditional blank-PDF guides, permanent pitch tracking, and MLB-aligned live scoring.

scripts.test: node tests/baseball-data.test.js && node tests/index-connection.test.js && node tests/startup-reset.test.js && node tests/refresh-section.test.js && node tests/responsive-layout.test.js && node tests/pitch-count.test.js && node tests/pitch-tracking.test.js && node tests/undo-rebuild.test.js && node tests/show-hide-codes.test.js && node tests/mlb-rules.test.js && node tests/button-wiring.test.js && node tests/version24-pdf-theme.test.js && node tests/version24-pdf-clarity.test.js
scripts.check:js: node --check app.js && node --check baseball-data.js && node --check service-worker.js
